steps.t: Unusâli and Sorkamâl will be travelling to the Dawn-warden with you to meet with the Aradûni. You should talk to Unusâli.
Unusâli, Sorkamâl, and Hidâti have gone ahead. You should meet them near Ushumût, the Grave of Serpents.
You are being attacked by fell mirages, seemingly caused by Ishími, the Anguished Wind. You should defeat the mirages!
Unusâli, Sorkamâl, and Hidâti have gone ahead to the Dawn-warden. You should continue west and find the Dawn-warden.
It seems that Ishími, the Anguished Wind haunts the Dawn-warden. You should find the Aradûni officer in charge of the camp.
